text:
E-commerce Product Page


"Build an e-commerce product page with a dark background, red accent color, product image gallery, product title price and description, size selector, add to cart button, and related products section"

**[✓] Task 11 — Product page complete. Self-check passed.**

---

✓ **All tasks complete**

**Pages built:**
- `Index.tsx` — Full e-commerce product page

**Components created:**
- `Navbar.tsx` — Sticky header with logo, nav links, mobile hamburger menu, and live cart badge
- `ImageGallery.tsx` — 5-image gallery with main view, thumbnails, arrow navigation, dot indicators, and zoom hint
- `SizeSelector.tsx` — 12-size grid with sold-out states (crossed out), selected state highlight in red, and size guide link
- `AddToCartButton.tsx` — Smart CTA with 3 states: idle (red), error-shake with prompt ("Select a Size"), success (green with checkmark) + wishlist button
- `ProductCard.tsx` — Reusable card with hover quick-add overlay, rating stars, sale badge
- `RelatedProducts.tsx` — 4-column grid section with staggered fade-in animations

**Utilities & Hooks:**
- `src/utils/productData.ts` — Full product data with sizes, details, related products
- `src/hooks/useCart.ts` — Cart state management with add/remove/count

**Design System:**
- Dark near-black background (`#0a0a0a`) with blood-red accents (`hsl(353, 78%, 48%)`)
- **Bebas Neue** display font for headings/prices, **DM Sans** for body copy
- Full semantic token system in `index.css` + `tailwind.config.ts` brand color extensions
- Fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop
